name: VISIUM TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: Visium Technologies, Inc. is a provider of IT infrastructure professional services including network engineering, system engineering, converged infrastructure deployment, software development, Artificial Intelligence application development, and cybersecurity services. The Company provides a comprehensive suite of cybersecurity and AI solutions, with its proprietary TruContext platform for cyber warfare analytics, visualization, and knowledge management. Visium plans to generate revenue through a virtual appliance model, SaaS model, and professional services.

exposures.sentence: Visium’s proprietary cyber security visualization, big data analytics and automation platform operates in the traditional cyber security space, as well as in the Internet of Things and data analytics spaces.

Visium is a provider of IT infrastructure professional services including network engineering, system engineering, converged infrastructure deployment, software development, Artificial Intelligence application development, and cybersecurity services.

The Company is entering the digital transformation and data center design and construction market after it landed a contract in November, 2023 valued at over $20 million from its partner, Cybastion Institute of Technology.
CyGraph is a military-grade, highly scalable big data analytics tool for cyber security, using graph database technology.
